editorialEyebrow: Open science, organized from the first question
editorialTitle: Make research evidence easy to continue.
editorialSubtitle: OpenBioScience keeps questions, files, tasks, and agent work in one calm workspace, so every result can be traced, discussed, and continued.
petSubtitle: Keeping evidence, people, and next steps aligned.

principles.oneBody: Files, notes, tasks, and decisions stay connected to the question they came from.
principles.twoBody: Every agent run leaves a readable path from intent to output.
principles.threeBody: Agents help with routine work while people keep judgment, authorship, and review in view.

subtitle: Continue evidence, tasks, and conversations without losing the thread
footerPrimary: Your workspace keeps the trail of questions, evidence, and next steps
footerSecondary: Open work stays easy to resume
